sourceMovie.title: RE:BORN
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: RE:BORN works as a action movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The action and crime blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Vantage Point
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If RE:BORN clicked for you, Vantage Point (2008) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and crime, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Smokin' Aces
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If RE:BORN clicked for you, Smokin' Aces (2006) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and crime, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after RE:BORN?
faq.answer: Try Vantage Point, Smokin' Aces, The Replacement Killers—each shares DNA with RE:BORN while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is RE:BORN?
faq.answer: RE:BORN (2016) is best described as Action, Crime. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is RE:BORN worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.1/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
